title: Research Assistant position now open
summary: NEIT Lab is recruiting a Research Assistant to support wearable neural-interface research, embedded electronics development, and laboratory infrastructure.
content: The successful candidate will contribute to the development of experimental setups, embedded electronics, wearable systems, and biosignal recordings.

title: New Funding: Novo Nordisk Foundation Start Grant Package
summary: Dr. Deren Y. Barsakcioglu is awarded the Novo Nordisk Foundation Start Grant Package.
content: The award provides funding for researchers and critical research infrastructure to establish NEIT Lab and develop wearable adaptive neural interface technologies.

title: New paper on muscle and motoneuron synergies in biomimetic and non-biomimetic 3-DoF tasks
summary: Our latest work explores differences in encoded information at the muscle and motoneuron level during real-time myoelectric control.
content: The paper investigates muscle- and motoneuron-level synergies during biomimetic and non-biomimetic three-degree-of-freedom control tasks, providing new insights into neural representations relevant for future human-machine interfaces.

title: NEIT website launched
summary: The Neural Engineering and Interface Technologies group website is now live.
content: The website introduces the NEIT research group, its research themes, publications, opportunities, and news. It will continue to evolve as the group grows.
